name: asb-skill-collections
description: Curated, evidence-grounded scientific-agent skill and tool collections from the AgenticScienceBuilder pipeline.

plugins.name: metabolomics
plugins.description: Computational metabolomics (predominantly LC-MS/MS; also LC-MS, GC-MS, NMR, mass-spectrometry imaging, ion mobility, lipidomics, multi-omics): spectral library matching, molecular networking, formula/structure annotation (SIRIUS), preprocessing, normalization, and statistics — 5,865 evidence-grounded skills over 909 tools, each derived from a peer-reviewed method paper, with a Perspicacite KB auto-grounding binder.

plugins.name: metabolomics-ce-ms
plugins.description: CE-MS subset of the ASB metabolomics collection: 114 evidence-grounded skills (lighter than the full collection; skills may also appear in other technique packs).

plugins.name: metabolomics-direct-infusion
plugins.description: direct-infusion-MS subset of the ASB metabolomics collection: 97 evidence-grounded skills (lighter than the full collection; skills may also appear in other technique packs).

plugins.name: metabolomics-gc-ms
plugins.description: GC-MS subset of the ASB metabolomics collection: 367 evidence-grounded skills (lighter than the full collection; skills may also appear in other technique packs).

plugins.name: metabolomics-ion-mobility
plugins.description: ion-mobility-MS subset of the ASB metabolomics collection: 390 evidence-grounded skills (lighter than the full collection; skills may also appear in other technique packs).

plugins.name: metabolomics-lc-ms
plugins.description: LC-MS subset of the ASB metabolomics collection: 2621 evidence-grounded skills (lighter than the full collection; skills may also appear in other technique packs).

plugins.name: metabolomics-ms-generic
plugins.description: mass-spectrometry subset of the ASB metabolomics collection: 804 evidence-grounded skills (lighter than the full collection; skills may also appear in other technique packs).

plugins.name: metabolomics-ms-imaging
plugins.description: MS-imaging subset of the ASB metabolomics collection: 292 evidence-grounded skills (lighter than the full collection; skills may also appear in other technique packs).

plugins.name: metabolomics-nmr
plugins.description: NMR subset of the ASB metabolomics collection: 276 evidence-grounded skills (lighter than the full collection; skills may also appear in other technique packs).
